description: Stroke-focused early questioning. Onset, last-known-normal, and focal neurologic symptoms come first.
questions: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
What was the last time you felt completely normal?
Are you having weakness, numbness, trouble speaking, or trouble understanding speech right now?
Have your symptoms been getting worse, staying the same, or coming and going?
Have you noticed any vision changes, like blurred vision or loss of vision?
